title: Tavily
description: Open-web search and page extraction optimised for LLM agents. Use with the Researcher agent for real-time research with cited sources.

exposeAsCapability.label: Web search
exposeAsCapability.tooltip: Search the open web for current information via Tavily

operations.name: search
operations.title: Search the web
operations.description: Search the open web via Tavily. Returns top results with title, URL, content snippet, and score. Use 'basic' depth for quick facts, 'advanced' for deeper research.

max_results.description: Max results to return (1-10, server caps at 5 for context safety). Default 5.

include_answer.description: Ask Tavily to synthesise a direct answer in addition to raw results.

topic.description: 'general' or 'news'. Use 'news' with 'days' for recency-sensitive queries.

days.description: For topic='news', max age of results in days.

operations.name: extract
operations.title: Extract page content
operations.description: Fetch cleaned main-article text for one or more URLs. Use for deep reads of the most promising search results.

urls.description: URLs to extract (1-5, server caps at 5).

setupGuide:
1. Sign up at https://tavily.com and create an API key.
2. Paste the key below (starts with `tvly-`).
3. Click Test connection, then Save.

Free tier = 1000 calls/month. Paid plans bump the quota and unlock `search_depth: 'advanced'` and `extract`.
